notes.cost.raw: Original cost string exactly as listed (may be CP, SP, or GP).
notes.cost.gp: Cost normalized to gold pieces (10 CP = 1 SP, 10 SP = 1 GP). Fractional values are exact, e.g. a 1 SP item is 0.1. Null when the source lists 'Varies' or no price.
notes.cost.special: 'varies' when no fixed price applies; null otherwise.
notes.categories: Armor, Weapon, Ammunition, Adventuring Gear, Tool, Mount, Vehicle.
notes.weight: Preserved as the source's display string (e.g. '5 lb.'); not normalized.
notes.excluded: Trinkets (no cost), Currency (exchange rates, not goods), and Poisons page were omitted as non-priced or non-purchasable reference. Full item rules/descriptions are on the linked source_url pages; only pricing-relevant fields are captured here.
notes.source_url: Points to the subpage the item's table lives on, not a per-item page (the equipment section uses per-table pages).
